name: Scenario Create
description:
Dive into the world of your own imagination. You can fulfill every fantasy you have dreamt of just type out how would like to start out your journey and enjoy the ride. You can add as must twist if you want. You can kill characters without feeling guilty you can become god or a slave its all up to you.
